title: Level Z - Artifacts
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Artifacts mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Artifacts mod.

This addon adds level requirements for all artifacts to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add the artifacts mod to your mod packs without worrying about specific artifacts making you skip progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
